review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9:
Work-Life balance is tilted towards "life" for Head Office employees
The most compliant business in the industry
Plenty of leaves offered.
Strong global brands.
review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9 2:
Almost no over career progression. Still consists of various employees doing the same role for decades with no career progression/growth in skills. Movement of job roles is very very restricted.

Extremely political workplace with lots of good employees leaving the company. So called "P4G"-Performance for Growth process is not objectively implemented.

Capability of line managers needs plenty of improvement.
 
Never attracts the best talent. In fact, company is willing to compromise heavily on output to promote diversity.

Very hierarchial organization. Need for being "Politically Correct" in front of senior management is considered important. 

Senior Management can back out even on their written word. Views on employees/projects/roles can change overnight.

Necessary IT enablement in various internal and external processes will take years, if not decades. Hence, a lot of back end employees will continue doing tedious, no value addition roles 

Legacy Business concerns will take years to get sorted.

Known for firing people periodically.
